title: PLA Dispatches 26 Aircraft; 16 Cross Median Line
detail: Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense detected 26 PLA aircraft operating around Taiwan on March 21, with 16 crossing the median line into Taiwan's ADIZ. Seven PLA warships accompanied the air operations. This represents a full resumption of PLA activity to pre-lull levels following a two-week pause during China's National People's Congress (Feb 27 - March 5), with gradual escalation from March 11 onward.

title: Taiwan Legislature Blocks Defense Spending Increases
detail: Taiwan faces domestic political paralysis as its legislature, controlled by the opposition Kuomintang (KMT) and Taiwan People's Party (TPP), continues blocking defense spending increases proposed by President Lai Ching-te's Democratic Progressive Party (DPP). Security analysts warn this weakens Taiwan's deterrence capacity at a critical time. Washington has been sending mixed signals on its commitment to Taiwan's defense, further complicating the strategic picture.
